XONLINE_FEEDBACK_TYPE

Defines the possible types of feedback that can be sent to the Xbox Live service using the XOnlineFeedbackSend function.

typedef enum {
    XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_NICKNAME,
    XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_GAMEPLAY,
    XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_SCREAMING,
    XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_HARASSMENT,
    XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_LEWDNESS,
    XONLINE_FEEDBACK_POS_ATTITUDE,
    XONLINE_FEEDBACK_POS_SESSION,
    XONLINE_FEEDBACK_POS_STATS_ATTACHMENT,
    XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_STATS_ATTACHMENT,
    XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_STATS_ATTACHMENT_CHEATING,
    XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_MESSAGE_INAPPROPRIATE,
    XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_MESSAGE_SPAM,
    XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_TEAM_NAME,
    XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_TEAM_MOTTO,
    XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_TEAM_CONTENT,
    XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_TEAM_DESCRIPTION,
    XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_TEAM_URL,
    XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_COMPETITION_NAME,
    XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_COMPETITION_MOTTO,
    XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_COMPETITION_CONTENT,
    NUM_XONLINE_FEEDBACK_TYPES,
} XONLINE_FEEDBACK_TYPE;

Constants

XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_NICKNAME
Negative feedback: The player specified in XOnlineFeedbackSend created an offensive nickname.
XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_GAMEPLAY
Negative feedback: The player specified in XOnlineFeedbackSend has demonstrated inappropriate gameplay.
XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_SCREAMING
Negative feedback: The player specified in XOnlineFeedbackSend has demonstrated verbally abusive behavior.
XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_HARASSMENT
Negative feedback: The player specified in XOnlineFeedbackSend has been harassing other players.
XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_LEWDNESS
Negative feedback: The player specified in XOnlineFeedbackSend has demonstrated lewd behavior.
XONLINE_FEEDBACK_POS_ATTITUDE
Positive feedback: The player specified in XOnlineFeedbackSend demonstrates good attitude.
XONLINE_FEEDBACK_POS_SESSION
Positive feedback: A good game session occurred with the player specified in XOnlineFeedbackSend.
XONLINE_FEEDBACK_POS_STATS_ATTACHMENT
Positive feedback: The player specified in XOnlineFeedbackSend uploaded a game clip demonstrating good gameplay or containing valuable content.
XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_STATS_ATTACHMENT
Negative feedback: The player specified in XOnlineFeedbackSend uploaded a game clip containing inappropriate content.
XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_STATS_ATTACHMENT_CHEATING
Negative feedback: The player specified in XOnlineFeedbackSend uploaded a game clip demonstrating cheating.
XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_MESSAGE_INAPPROPRIATE
Negative feedback: The player specified in XOnlineFeedbackSend sent a message containing inappropriate content.
XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_MESSAGE_SPAM
Negative feedback: The player specified in XOnlineFeedbackSend sent an unnecessary number of similar messages or a message with unsolicited commercial content.
XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_TEAM_NAME
Negative feedback: The team specified in XOnlineFeedbackSend has an inappropriate name.
XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_TEAM_MOTTO
Negative feedback: The team specified in XOnlineFeedbackSend has an inappropriate motto.
XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_TEAM_CONTENT
Negative feedback: The team specified in XOnlineFeedbackSend has inappropriate content.
XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_TEAM_DESCRIPTION
Negative feedback: The team specified in XOnlineFeedbackSend has an inappropriate description.
XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_TEAM_URL
Negative feedback: The team specified in XOnlineFeedbackSend has an inappropriate URL.
XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_COMPETITION_NAME
Negative feedback: The player specified in XOnlineFeedbackSend created a competition with an inappropriate name.
XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_COMPETITION_MOTTO
Negative feedback: The player specified in XOnlineFeedbackSend created a competition with an inappropriate motto.
XONLINE_FEEDBACK_NEG_COMPETITION_CONTENT
Negative feedback: The player specified in XOnlineFeedbackSend created a competition with inappropriate content.
NUM_XONLINE_FEEDBACK_TYPES
Number of public feedback types.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Xonline.h.

See Also

Xbox Live Enumerated Types | XOnlineFeedbackSend
